languages.original_text: "It is my sacred duty to stand vigil to ensure the faithful operation of the technology I restored. Beyond that, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is an enclosed community. Many wisdoms can be found within its walls, but I seem to have exhausted their supply. Theory lays the foundation for exploration, but only practice can open the gates of knowledge. Nuncius and I have always been practitioners first and foremost.

languages.text: "Бдение над верной эксплуатацией восстановленных мной технологий — мой священный долг. Помимо этого, Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17 — закрытая обитель. В ее стенах можно обрести многие мудрости, но, кажется, я исчерпал их запас. Теория закладывает основу для изысканий, но лишь практика способна открыть врата Познания. Мы с Нунциусом всегда были в первую очередь практиками".

Many wisdoms can be found within its walls, but I seem to have exhausted their supply. Theory lays the foundation for exploration, but only practice can open the gates of knowledge. languages.text: 「私が修復した技術が正しく機能していることを確認するために、私は警備を続ける聖なる義務があります。それ以外に、アルター・テンプルム・カリシス・エクスト17は閉鎖されたコミュニティです。その壁の中に多くの知恵があります。しかし、私はその供給を枯渇させてしまったようです。理論は探求の基礎を築きますが、知識の扉を開くのは実践だけです。ヌンシウスと私は、常に実践者として最優先してきました」
languages.original_text: "It is my sacred duty to stand vigil to ensure the faithful operation of the technology I restored. Beyond that, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is an enclosed community. Many wisdoms can be found within its walls, but I seem to have exhausted their supply. Theory lays the foundation for exploration, but only practice can open the gates of knowledge. Nuncius and I have always been practitioners first and foremost.

languages.text: "Es ist meine heilige Pflicht, wachsam zu sein und den verlässlichen Betrieb der von mir wiederhergestellten Technologie zu gewährleisten. Abgesehen davon ist Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 eine geschlossene Gemeinschaft. Innerhalb ihrer Mauern finden sich viele Weisheiten, aber ich scheine ihre Versorgung erschöpft zu haben. Theorien sind das Fundament für Forschungen, aber allein die Praxis kann die Tore des Wissens öffnen. Nuncius und ich waren schon immer in erster Line Praktiker.
languages.original_text: "It is my sacred duty to stand vigil to ensure the faithful operation of the technology I restored. Beyond that, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is an enclosed community. Many wisdoms can be found within its walls, but I seem to have exhausted their supply. Theory lays the foundation for exploration, but only practice can open the gates of knowledge. Nuncius and I have always been practitioners first and foremost.

traits.locale_text: "Es ist meine heilige Pflicht, wachsam zu sein und den verlässlichen Betrieb der von mir wiederhergestellten Technologie zu gewährleisten. Abgesehen davon ist Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 eine geschlossene Gemeinschaft. Innerhalb ihrer Mauern finden sich viele Weisheiten, aber ich scheine ihre Versorgung erschöpft zu haben. Theorien sind das Fundament für Forschungen, aber allein die Praxis kann die Tore des Wissens öffnen. Nuncius und ich waren schon immer in erster Line Praktiker.

languages.text: «Tengo el deber sagrado de velar por el funcionamiento fidedigno de toda tecnología que restauro. Por lo demás, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 es una comunidad aislada. Sus estancias albergan grandes conocimientos, pero es una fuente de la que ya he bebido hasta la saciedad. El saber teórico sienta las bases de la exploración, pero solo mediante la práctica pueden abrirse del todo las puertas de la sabiduría. Nuncius y yo siempre hemos sido de naturaleza eminentemente práctica».
languages.original_text: "It is my sacred duty to stand vigil to ensure the faithful operation of the technology I restored. Beyond that, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is an enclosed community. Many wisdoms can be found within its walls, but I seem to have exhausted their supply. Theory lays the foundation for exploration, but only practice can open the gates of knowledge. Nuncius and I have always been practitioners first and foremost.

traits.locale_text: «Tengo el deber sagrado de velar por el funcionamiento fidedigno de toda tecnología que restauro. Por lo demás, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 es una comunidad aislada. Sus estancias albergan grandes conocimientos, pero es una fuente de la que ya he bebido hasta la saciedad. El saber teórico sienta las bases de la exploración, pero solo mediante la práctica pueden abrirse del todo las puertas de la sabiduría. Nuncius y yo siempre hemos sido de naturaleza eminentemente práctica».

languages.text: "Restore ettiğim teknolojinin sadık bir şekilde çalışmasını sağlamak için nöbet tutmak benim kutsal vazifemdir. Bunun ötesinde, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 kapalı bir topluluktur. Duvarları arasında pek çok bilgeliğe rastlanabilir ancak ben bunların kaynağını tüketmiş sayılırım. Teori, keşfin temelini atsa da irfanın kapılarını ancak pratik açabilir. Nuncius ve ben her daim her şeyden evvel pratisyen olmuşuzdur."
languages.original_text: "It is my sacred duty to stand vigil to ensure the faithful operation of the technology I restored. Beyond that, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is an enclosed community. Many wisdoms can be found within its walls, but I seem to have exhausted their supply. Theory lays the foundation for exploration, but only practice can open the gates of knowledge. Nuncius and I have always been practitioners first and foremost.

traits.locale_text: "Restore ettiğim teknolojinin sadık bir şekilde çalışmasını sağlamak için nöbet tutmak benim kutsal vazifemdir. Bunun ötesinde, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 kapalı bir topluluktur. Duvarları arasında pek çok bilgeliğe rastlanabilir ancak ben bunların kaynağını tüketmiş sayılırım. Teori, keşfin temelini atsa da irfanın kapılarını ancak pratik açabilir. Nuncius ve ben her daim her şeyden evvel pratisyen olmuşuzdur."

languages.text: « Il est de mon devoir sacré de veiller au bon fonctionnement de la technologie que j'ai moi-même restaurée. Sans compter que l'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 est une communauté fermée. Ses murs renferment sans conteste une grande sagesse, mais j'en ai épuisé toutes les ressources, et si la théorie jette les bases de l'exploration, seule la pratique peut ouvrir les portes de la connaissance. Nuncius et moi-même avons toujours été des adeptes de la pratique. »
languages.original_text: "It is my sacred duty to stand vigil to ensure the faithful operation of the technology I restored. Beyond that, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is an enclosed community. Many wisdoms can be found within its walls, but I seem to have exhausted their supply. Theory lays the foundation for exploration, but only practice can open the gates of knowledge. Nuncius and I have always been practitioners first and foremost.

traits.locale_text: « Il est de mon devoir sacré de veiller au bon fonctionnement de la technologie que j'ai moi-même restaurée. Sans compter que l'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 est une communauté fermée. Ses murs renferment sans conteste une grande sagesse, mais j'en ai épuisé toutes les ressources, et si la théorie jette les bases de l'exploration, seule la pratique peut ouvrir les portes de la connaissance. Nuncius et moi-même avons toujours été des adeptes de la pratique. »

languages.text: “守护我所修复的技术，确保其虔信运作，乃是我的神圣职责。此外，卡利西斯祭坛17号是一个封闭社群。在它的围墙之内，虽有诸多智慧，但我似乎已发掘殆尽。理论为探索奠定了基础，但唯有实践能开启知识之门。努恩修斯与我，向来以实践为先。”
languages.original_text: "It is my sacred duty to stand vigil to ensure the faithful operation of the technology I restored. Beyond that, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is an enclosed community. Many wisdoms can be found within its walls, but I seem to have exhausted their supply. Theory lays the foundation for exploration, but only practice can open the gates of knowledge. Nuncius and I have always been practitioners first and foremost.

traits.locale_text: “守护我所修复的技术，确保其虔信运作，乃是我的神圣职责。此外，卡利西斯祭坛17号是一个封闭社群。在它的围墙之内，虽有诸多智慧，但我似乎已发掘殆尽。理论为探索奠定了基础，但唯有实践能开启知识之门。努恩修斯与我，向来以实践为先。”
